title: eupatorium cannabinum var. indivisum
intro: Eupatorium cannabinum var. indivisum, also known as Hemp Agrimony, is a variety of the Hemp Agrimony plant, a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Hemp Agrimony include soothing sore throats, calming digestive issues, and reducing fever. Hemp Agrimony can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including bronchitis and rheumatism.
